name: Melvin
description: Melvin is the hedging infrastructure for prediction markets. We use AI to map outcome correlations across Polymarket and Kalshi and translate them into executable hedges via crypto perps. That lets professional traders neutralize event risk, protect PnL, and unlock capital efficiency instead of sitting in idle collateral. The system continuously ingests signals from 19+ news + trading sources, prices volatility and liquidity shifts in real time, and routes trades through x402-enabled endpoints for automated execution and re-hedging as odds move.
